testResults.name: getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC-2 (regression): refuses fallback ONLY when inside a worktree THROWS when called from a directory with a worktree gitlink (.git as FILE)
getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC-2 (regression): refuses fallback ONLY when inside a worktree does NOT create an orphan .cleo/ when inside a worktree on throw

getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC bootstrap: explicit opt-in restores legacy fallback returns <cwd>/.cleo when called with { bootstrap: true }
getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC bootstrap: explicit opt-in restores legacy fallback does NOT auto-create the directory on bootstrap-mode read

getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC-3 (three-worktree-deep): nested simulated worktrees stay clean does NOT create .cleo/ in any of 3 nested worktree-like dirs
getCleoDirAbsolute — root-cause chokepoint (T9803 / D009) AC SSoT: absolute CLEO_DIR bypass still wins returns CLEO_DIR verbatim when it is absolute (no walk, no throw)
